positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a forest spirit emerging from bioluminescent roots and glowing flora. The spirit should have gentle, flowing lines and appear mid-motion, creating an ethereal silhouette. The composition should be centered and vertically balanced, emphasizing deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and glowing gold accents. Use a strong gothic-whimsical art style, reminiscent of classic children's book illustrations but with an artistic, modern graphic sensibility. The lighting must be dramatic and moody, with light emanating from the flora (luminescence). Crisp vector lines are desired, suitable for direct screen printing onto fabric. High contrast, central focus.
negative: lowres, artifacts, blur, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, tiling, noisy, grainy, poorly drawn, photographic, realistic, muted colors, logo
